source.sections: Section 5.8 (Earth Pressure), Table 1 (Load Factors), Section 6 (Highway Live Loads)

earth_pressure.notes: Earth pressure gamma_fL applies to all 5 load combinations per Table 1. Surcharge values from Section 5.8.2.

dead_load_factors.notes: From MoWT Vol 4, Table 1 and Section 5.1-5.2

fill_depth_classification.notes: Classification determines load model: shallow = concentrated wheel loads, standard = distributed surcharge, deep = earth pressure dominates

foundation_design.notes: CP 2004 uses nominal (unfactored) loads. gamma_fL = 1.0 and gamma_f3 = 1.0 when checking foundations per MoWT Vol 4, Section 4.7. CP 2004 is an older code, superseded by Eurocode 7 in the UK.

typical_fill_properties.notes: K0 = 0.5 for at-rest conditions (rigid box culverts). Ka = 0.33 for active conditions (flexible walls, rarely applicable to rigid culverts).
